title: atadinus fallax
side_effects: Atadinus fallax can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe stomach upset, dizziness, and nausea, which can be caused by its high levels of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to these toxins can lead to more serious health issues, including liver damage and respiratory failure. In rare cases, improper use of Atadinus fallax can also cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and anaphylaxis. If ingested in large quantities, it can lead to cardiac arrest and even death.
